category_sources: Official GitHub README describes Diagram as a CLI application to generate hand drawn diagrams from ASCII art.
source_facts.description says it converts ASCII art into hand drawn diagrams.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub README uses the project title Diagram.
docs_sources: Official GitHub repository README provides installation, usage, key bindings, and examples.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already has value https://github.com/esimov/diagram; per instruction, repo returned as null and not second-guessed.
tags_sources: Official GitHub README lists CLI, editor, preview, and diagram generation features.
source_facts.description identifies ASCII-art to hand-drawn diagram conversion.
